vulnerabilityAlerts.description: Security fixes jump the queue and auto-merge as soon as CI is green.

packageRules.description: Patch + minor auto-merge once the full CI gate is green (build + test + forge + demos:verify). The gate is the safety net.
Majors are NEVER auto-merged — manual review. This is where a kit@7-style ecosystem break lands in isolation (CI red) instead of shipping.
The Solana stack is peer-coupled — bump the whole cluster in one PR so CI catches any ecosystem mismatch at once.
HOLD @solana/kit < 7 until the @solana-program/* crates ship kit-7-compatible releases (kit 7 removed getMinimumBalanceForRentExemption, which they import). Revisit when their peers move to ^7.
